title: Celestial: Reborn
body:
![Celestial Reborn Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c483b57a8948f386eb55a58cc8738d31aeb9132_0.webp)
## The Modpack
**Celestial: Reborn** is a next-generation space exploration experience for Minecraft, built around progression, discovery, and the feeling of truly leaving Earth behind.

Begin your journey with limited resources and a single goal: reach the stars. Build your first machines, develop rocket technology, and launch into the unknown. Every step forward unlocks new possibilities — from establishing your first lunar outpost to constructing massive interplanetary colonies.

Explore diverse planets, each with unique environments, resources, and hidden secrets. Survive extreme conditions, discover ancient structures, and push your technology further than ever before. Automation, industry, and exploration merge into one long-term multiplayer adventure.

![The Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/036d96846311fbb2bc0f12e7d6816deaedca1b06_0.webp)
# The Mods

Celestial: Reborn combines space exploration, technology, adventure, and immersion into one large Minecraft experience. With mods like **Ad Astra, Astrocraft, and Planets+,** you can travel beyond Earth, explore new planets, and build your own path through the stars. At the same time, tech and building mods like Create, alongside world-enhancing mods such as **Biomes O’ Plenty, Terralith, YUNG’s structures, and When Dungeons Arise,** make every world feel larger, more alive, and full of discovery. Quality-of-life, visual, and multiplayer mods complete the experience and turn the modpack into a long-term journey for solo players and servers alike.


This is not just about reaching space — it's about building a civilization beyond Earth.

- Progress from Earth to deep space
- Discover unique planets and dangerous environments
- Build automated space industries
- Explore mysterious structures and hidden lore
- Designed for long-term multiplayer progression

_This Modpack is managed by Blizz606 and Vision Projects_
